prompt_en: A violent red corridor breakout where warning beacons strobe across wet concrete, barricades collapse, and evacuees rush through a route bought with smoke and force. checkpoint pursuit, diesel smoke, official line versus detour line, compressing corridors. warning beacons, collapsing barricades, wet concrete, evacuee rush, smoke-choked route. Grounded Korean apocalypse cinematic realism.
prompt_ko_context: 뚫고 나가는 데는 성공했지만 기록과 정당성이 무너진 엔딩. 붉은 경고등과 폭주가 핵심이다.
camera_notes: Use aggressive lateral motion, close debris passes, and end on a corridor still flashing after the crowd is gone.
audio_notes: Alarm sweep, rebar screech, running feet, and a clipped cut to silence.
stitch_prompt: A violent red corridor breakout where warning beacons strobe across wet concrete, barricades collapse, and evacuees rush through a route bought with smoke and force. Match style pack P2.ending.p2_end_red_corridor.
